The co owner called me r######d and said i was annoying and said he banned me because i was using my phone for a sound board and he also said gorilla tag bans people for playing music so we will too which is not true gorilla tag does not ban people for playing music if you are in casuals and there's literally an infection game mode in this game this moderation is the worst i've ever seen

developer_response.body:
Howdy everyone,

I’m part of the Villan Studios support team, and we want to clarify an important rule moving forward.

Soundboards are, and have always been, a bannable offense. Using them is considered similar to modding, as it disrupts gameplay and gives an unfair or unintended experience to others.

Please refrain from using soundboards to avoid penalties on your account.

Thank you for helping us keep the game fair and enjoyable for everyone.
— Villan Studios Support Team

Oogly Boogly is honestly one of the best and most unique VR horror games I’ve played. It mixes real creepy moments with fun, creative gameplay, so it’s not just about jump scares—it actually keeps you engaged the whole time.
What really makes the game stand out is how immersive it feels in VR. The atmosphere, sounds, and unexpected moments make everything way more intense, and you never fully feel safe while playing.
But one of the best parts isn’t just the game—it’s the people behind it. The mods and team are super nice, respectful, and actually care about the community. They listen, help out, and keep things fair, which makes a huge difference.
The community is also really chill and helpful. Whether you’re new or experienced, people are willing to help, joke around, and make the game more fun instead of toxic.
Overall, Oogly Boogly isn’t just a great horror game—it’s a great experience because of the amazing team and positive community behind it. Definitely worth playing.
